{{Quote|Dead. Internal injuries, I think. And he's still clutching a message canister—I just hope it was worth ''this.''|Jace, upon discovering Maraba Tev's body|<ref name="marvel51" />}}
'''Jace''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who worked as part of the crew of an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He was one of the people on duty during the recovery of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Maraba Tev]]'s body as the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] was returning to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance fleet]] with information on the new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']].<ref name="marvel51" />
